=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/missedPipeableOpportunity_error.ts(12,41): warning TS377050: This nested call structure has a pipeable form. `Schema.decodeEffect(MyStruct)({ x: 42, y: 42 }).pipe(...)` represents the same call sequence in pipe style and may be easier to read. effect(missedPipeableOpportunity)


==== /.src/tsconfig.json (0 errors) ====
    {
      "compilerOptions": {
        "plugins": [
          {
            "name": "@effect/language-service",
            "pipeableMinArgCount": 2
          }
        ]
      }
    }
    

==== /.src/missedPipeableOpportunity_error.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics missedPipeableOpportunity:warning
    import { Duration, identity, pipe, Schedule, Schema } from "effect"
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    const MyStruct = Schema.Struct({
      x: Schema.Finite,
      y: Schema.Finite
    })
    
    export const shouldNotTrigger = identity(Schema.decodeEffect(MyStruct)({ x: 42, y: 42 }))
    
    export const shouldTriggerBecauseHas2 = identity(identity(Schema.decodeEffect(MyStruct)({ x: 42, y: 42 })))
                                            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377050: This nested call structure has a pipeable form. `Schema.decodeEffect(MyStruct)({ x: 42, y: 42 }).pipe(...)` represents the same call sequence in pipe style and may be easier to read. effect(missedPipeableOpportunity)
    
    export const shouldNotTriggerFunctionReturned = pipe(
      Schedule.exponential(Duration.millis(10), 4),
      Schedule.while(_ => Duration.isLessThanOrEqualTo(Duration.seconds(10))(_.duration)) // should not report
    )
    
    export const shouldNotTriggerInnerPipe = Effect.log("Hello").pipe(
      Effect.ensuring(Effect.log("World"))
    )
